title: How to Get a Police Certificate – Liechtenstein - Canada.ca
content:
## How to Get a Police Certificate – Liechtenstein
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.
Do I need to provide a Police Certificate with my Application for Permanent Residence? Yes
Name of document(s) to get: Extract from Central Police Records ( Auszug aus dem Strafregister or Strafregisterbescheinigung)

## How to get a Police Certificate:

### If you are a citizen of Liechtenstein:

#### If you live in Liechtenstein:
You can apply in person at the Landgericht (see Special notes and considerations for complete address) or online through the Landesverwaltung Furstentum website (available in German only).

#### If you live outside of Liechtenstein:
Please follow the procedures for Switzerland .

### If you are not a citizen of Liechtenstein:

#### If you live in Liechtenstein:
You can apply in person at the Landgericht (see Special notes and considerations for complete address) or online through the Landesverwaltung Furstentum website (available in German only).

#### If you live outside of Liechtenstein:
Please follow the procedures for Switzerland .

### Information and documents you need:
- Official identification
- Applicable fees (to be paid in CHF only)

### Special notes and considerations
Landgericht Spaniagasse 1 9490 Vaduz Liechtenstein +423 236 71 59 +423 236 65 39
If you cannot get an Extract from Central Police Records in Liechtenstein, you can apply in Switzerland. Please refer to How to Get a Police Certificate – Switzerland for more information.
